text:
sysinstall crashes with segmentation fault after it has extracted the
ports and tries to obtain INDEX.

No more information available unfortunately.
May be due to packages missing or so forth in the beta, however surely
it should not segfault.

Fix: 

sorry dont have a setup where i can properly debug it
How-To-Repeat: install FreeBSD 7.0-BETA4 from boot-only or disk1
